summary: Classified the open canonical issue and linked repairable PR from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned directly by this worker. actions.reason: Keep the reporter issue open as the canonical tracking thread until a repaired or replacement fix path lands and validates the Windows doctor behavior.
